overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 featuring Geralt running along a rocky shoreline at dusk under a dramatic purple storm sky. The character transitions from the gravel beach into shallow coastal waters as night falls, revealing distant snow-capped mountains and a stone tower.

agents.ego_description: Geralt runs steadily along the rocky beach with the sea to his left and forest to his right

entered.detail: gravel and stone beach forming the walking path
calm dark water along the shoreline
dense evergreen trees lining the coast
dramatic purple and pink storm clouds at dusk
tree-covered mountain slope rising behind the forest

segments.scene_description: Geralt runs along a rocky shoreline with calm coastal waters to the left and dense pine forest to the right. The sky displays dramatic purple and pink storm clouds as dusk settles over the landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky beach approaching water entry point

events.description: ambient light dims significantly as dusk deepens toward night
distant stone tower becomes visible on the left horizon

agents.ego_description: continuing to run along the shore as visibility decreases and the sky darkens

entered.detail: tall dark stone tower silhouetted against the horizon

segments.scene_description: The light fades considerably as Geralt continues along the beach. A distant stone tower emerges on the left horizon against darkening storm clouds, while the surrounding forest becomes shadowed.

events.description: character steps off rocky shore into shallow coastal water
character turns left and wades deeper into the water toward open sea

agents.ego_description: turning left and wading into the shallow water, moving away from the shoreline toward deeper water

entered.detail: calm shallow water with visible stones beneath the surface
distant mountain range with visible snow on the peaks

segments.scene_description: Geralt turns left and wades into the shallow coastal water as night falls. The rocky shore and pine forest recede behind him while snow-capped mountains and the stone tower become prominent ahead against the darkening sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rocky shoreline that transitions from a dramatic dusk landscape into a darkening nocturnal coastal scene. It begins with Geralt running between calm coastal waters and a dense pine forest under a sky filled with purple and pink storm clouds. As the light fades and the surrounding forest sinks into deep shadow, a distant stone tower gradually emerges on the left horizon against the darkening clouds. The scene then shifts as Geralt turns left to wade into the shallow water, causing the rocky shore and trees to recede behind him. Finally, the environment opens up to reveal prominent snow-capped mountains and the stone tower ahead under the cover of night.
